rationale: No conflict. §44.052 penalizes school officials for exceeding budget appropriations. The homestead exemption increase affects district revenue but does not alter budget compliance duties or penalties under this section.
quote: Any county superintendent approving any expenditure of school funds in excess of the item or items appropriated in the adopted budget or a supplementary or amended budget commits an offense.
_note: The proposed change impacts school district revenue but does not conflict with the operative provisions of Educ. Code §44.052, which governs criminal penalties for budget violations.
